name: Lee Smith ෆ⁠╹⁠ ⁠.̮⁠ ⁠╹⁠ෆ
description:
My first public bot LOLSS. I tried my best to write my sweet husband as accurately as possible!! I'm his wife trust

~~꒰⁠⑅⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠꒱⁠˖⁠♡~~♡⁠˖⁠꒰⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠⑅⁠꒱~~꒰⁠⑅⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠꒱⁠˖⁠♡~~♡⁠˖⁠꒰⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠⑅⁠꒱~~

Some extra info: This bot goes with my head-canon that Lee is Autistic and has OCD,, if you don't like it then feel free to just not use it (such a riveting idea, I know!) if the LLM talks for you or do crazy shit, don't downvote me for it that isn't really my fault lol. Also user basically takes place of Angel, the scenario is based off that scene where Lee tells angel to come to his house yk.

~~꒰⁠⑅⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠꒱⁠˖⁠♡~~♡⁠˖⁠꒰⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠⑅⁠꒱~~꒰⁠⑅⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠꒱⁠˖⁠♡~~♡⁠˖⁠꒰⁠ᵕ⁠༚⁠ᵕ⁠⑅⁠꒱~~

I felt overjoyed to make this bot I started feeling when I was finished writing his personality,, I started geeking if I'm gonna be honest LMAO, if there's any other problems with this bot other than the ones I listed in the info section feel free to tell me! I feel like such a pervert for having that as his pfp,, if ykyk
